changes.change: Reduced Mana consumption and adjusted skill damage.
changes.changeZh: 減少法力消耗，調整技能傷害

changes.change: Increased recovery capabilities and adjusted skill damage.
changes.changeZh: 增強回復能力，調整技能傷害

changes.change: Increased skill recovery and skill effect
changes.changeZh: 提升技能回復和技能效果

changes.change: Increased Health recovery and skill damage
changes.changeZh: 提升生命值回復和技能傷害
調整技能效果和冷卻時間
調整技能傷害和冷卻時間

changes.change: We've added a brand-new ability, the Heaven-Earth Form, enhancing Yang Jian's unique Resistance mechanic and visual appearance. We've also significantly optimized the hit mechanic for Heaven Hound, and added a new Heavenly Eye attack in the normal state, granting both recovery and true damage.
changes.changeZh: 楊戩新增法天象地的全新能力，強化楊戩獨有的韌性機制與視覺感受。嘯天犬的命中機制也進行了大幅調整，楊戩更新增普通狀態下的天眼攻擊，使他能獲得回復並造成真傷。
changes.detail: We've added a brand-new ability, the Heaven-Earth Form, enhancing Yang Jian's unique Resistance mechanic and visual appearance. We've also significantly optimized the hit mechanic for Heaven Hound, and added a new Heavenly Eye attack in the normal state, granting both recovery and true damage.
changes.detailZh: 楊戩新增法天象地的全新能力，強化楊戩獨有的韌性機制與視覺感受。嘯天犬的命中機制也進行了大幅調整，楊戩更新增普通狀態下的天眼攻擊，使他能獲得回復並造成真傷。

changes.change: Ultimate Effect & Enhanced Basic Attack Upgrade
changes.changeZh: 大招效果升級&強化普攻升級
changes.detail: We've improved how Nakoruru and Mamahaha interact and battle together. Mamahaha can now help Nakoruru to fly over walls and provide a Movement Speed boost when Nakoruru leaves combat. Additionally, Nakoruru's enhanced Basic Attacks now stack, allowing you to deal more damage. We've also improved Nakoruru's endurance.
changes.detailZh: 「我們強化了娜可露露與瑪瑪哈哈協同作戰的玩法體驗，瑪瑪哈哈新增可輔助娜可露露飛行越牆、脫戰加速的能力，並使強化普攻可疊加施放，多重打擊。另外，我們也針對娜可露露的續航能力進行最佳化。」

changes.change: Enhanced Basic Attack and Ultimate Effect Upgrade
changes.changeZh: 強化普攻&大招效果升級
提升2技能傷害回復效果

changes.change: Enhanced Basic Attack and Ultimate Effect Upgrade
changes.changeZh: 強化普攻&大招效果升級

changes.change: Adjusted the damage enhanced Basic Attacks deal to heroes and non-hero units
changes.changeZh: 調整強化普攻對英雄和非英雄的傷害

changes.change: Skill 1 cooldown reduced, Ultimate damage increased
changes.changeZh: 縮短1技能冷卻時間，提升大招傷害

changes.detail: We've added a new Sanctification effect for Ziya that will be available when playing as a roamer.
changes.detailZh: 「我們為姜子牙增加了新的封神效果，讓他出現在遊走位時能夠提供額外效果。」

changes.change: Adjusted the early and late-game damage of enhanced Basic Attacks
changes.changeZh: 調整強化普攻的前後期傷害

changes.change: Skill 1 damage increased, Skill 2's cooldown reduced
changes.changeZh: 提升1技能傷害，縮短2技能冷卻時間

changes.change: Enhanced Synergy Between Different Skill Combos
changes.changeZh: 不同組合技之間互相強化
changes.detail: Mayene can combine skills to create a number of distinct effects. We've enhanced the synergies between these effects, opening up for new and creative combos.
changes.detailZh: 「姬小滿的組合技擁有不同的效果，我們為她新增了不同組合技之間的強化效果，使施放連招時有更多探索空間。」

changes.changeZh: 平衡不同套裝的效果收益
changes.detail: As a versatile fighter, Dun has excellent survivability. We have adjusted his skill bonuses to make him perform more consistently when using different equipment.
changes.detailZh: 「身為一位全能的戰士，夏侯惇的生存能力有目共睹，本次我們調整了他的技能加成結構，希望他在不同出裝下都能夠有不錯的表現。」

changes.detail: "Sakeer has performed exceptionally well since his release. We have moderately nerfed him to ensure a better experience for opponents."
changes.detailZh: 「桑啟上線後表現過於亮眼，我們將其適度削弱，以保證對手擁有良好的對抗體驗。」

changes.detail: "Pei has to switch forms to maximize his skill effects, but while in his tiger form, he has much shorter range and needs to get very close to his enemies. We've increased the stats of his tiger form to give him a higher margin of error."
changes.detailZh: 「裴擒虎需要切換形態才能發揮技能效果，但當他切換到虎形態的時候，需要與敵人近身作戰；我們適度地提高了他變成虎形態時的屬性，並提升他的容錯率。」

changes.change: Reduced skill cooldowns and increased damage and Health recovery.
changes.changeZh: 降低冷卻時間，提高傷害和回復
changes.detail: Ying was near the top in the rankings during the 'I'm a designer at HoK!' event in HoK Camp. Actually, Ying has notbeen updated for a while. We have reduced her skill cooldowns and slightly increased their damage and Health recovery.
changes.detailZh: 「在HOK CAMP的活動『我在HOK當企劃活動中』雲纓的排名靠前，事實上雲纓也已經沉寂很久了，本次我們降低了雲纓技能的冷卻時間，並適當提高了技能的基礎傷害和回復效果。」

changes.detail: Luara's passive made her overly reliant on Critical Rate equipment. We wanted to give her a playstyle that utilizes attack effects, so we adjusted the Critical Rate and attack effect aspects of her skillset. Also, since Luara gained serpent blades whenever she performs kills or assists, her performance was very dependent on the match situation. We hope that these changes will give her more consistency. Finally, we have also improved her playability and the display of some mechanics.
changes.detailZh: 「盧雅那的被動機制使她對暴擊裝備過度依賴，我們希望未來她可以擁有一套攻擊特效流的玩法，因此調整了暴擊率和攻擊特效衰減比例。此外，盧雅那參與擊殺和助攻可以獲得環刃，這讓盧雅那在不同局勢的戰鬥中表現落差較大，我們希望她可以更加穩定。最後，本次升級還改善了她的機制顯示和操作手感。」

changes.detail: Skill 2 is Zilong's main damage skill, but its damage output is somewhat lacking if it doesn't trigger his passive. Hence, we've slightly increased Skill 2's damage.
changes.detailZh: 「2技能作為趙雲的主要輸出技能，在沒有觸發被動的額外效果時傷害略顯不足，因此我們適當提高了2技能的傷害。」

changes.change: Increased base stats and Ultimate damage.
changes.changeZh: 提升基礎屬性和大招傷害
changes.detail: Li Bai has an agile combat style. We have increased his stats to improve his survivability if he makes a mistake.
changes.detailZh: 「李白有著非常靈活的作戰風格，我們提高了他的屬性以保證他偶爾失誤時的生存能力。」

changes.change: Reduced cooldown and increased damage from his Passive.
changes.changeZh: 降低冷卻時間，增加被動傷害
changes.detail: There were many calls to buff Guiguzi during the 'I'm a designer at HoK!' event in HoK Camp. Guiguzi players want to show off how good he can be, but don't always succeed. Hence, we have reduced some of his skill cooldowns to give them more opportunities to try.
changes.detailZh: 「在HOK CAMP的活動『我在HOK當企劃活動中』有很多加強鬼谷子的聲音。每位使用鬼谷子的召喚師都期待他能大放異彩，但並不是每一次嘗試都能夠成功，因此我們降低了他的技能冷卻時間，讓他有更多的嘗試的機會。」

changes.detail: Consort Yu's passive triggers on a chance. We wanted to give it more consistent damage output when it triggers.
changes.detailZh: 「虞姬的被動觸發有一定隨機性，我們希望在觸發的時候能夠造成更穩定的傷害。」

changes.detail: "Damage over time is an important element of how Cirrus deals damage. He has to lead with repeated hits. We've reduced his skill cooldowns to increase his overall damage frequency."
changes.detailZh: 「作為雲中君的重要輸出手段，持續傷害效果需要前置的連續命中，我們降低了他的技能冷卻時間，提升他整體的輸出頻率。」

changes.detail: Skill 1: Scorching Barrage
changes.detailZh: 最佳化1技能指示器

changes.change: Increased Skill 1's damage and Physical Defense.
changes.changeZh: 提升1技能傷害和物理防禦
changes.detail: During the 'I'm a dev for HoK!' event in Honor of Kings Camp, there were many calls to buff Erin, so we have increased her viability in the early game.
changes.detailZh: 「在HOK CAMP的活動『我在HOK當企劃活動中』加強艾琳的呼聲很高，因此本次我們提升了她前期的對抗能力。」

changes.detail: "I decide your future!" Nuwa  gains the ability to jump across matrices, and her matrices can now converge and merge.”
changes.detailZh: 「汝之造物主，在此！」全面升級後的女媧將擁有遷躍矩陣空間的能力，與此同時，她所創造的矩陣空間也能夠彼此吸引，相互融合。

changes.detail: Changed the stat-based calculation of the tokens' damage, so Di Renjie is no longer limited to attack effect equipment, but can try out other   builds.
changes.detailZh: 「調整令牌的屬性加成結構，讓狄大人不再與攻擊特效套裝綁定，可以嘗試更多的出裝選擇。」

changes.detail: Kaizer's damage absorption makes him a great frontline tank. We've increased his damage output so he can also work well with an attack preset.
changes.detailZh: 「鎧吸收傷害的能力讓他能夠承擔起前排的職責，本次我們提高了他的攻擊力加成，讓他在選擇攻擊套裝時也能有不錯的表現。」

changes.change: Increased Attack Range and Added Damage Reduction to Ultimate
changes.detail: "Gao needs to get close to as many enemies as possible while using his Ultimate, so we've increased his damage reduction to improve his survivability. Additionally, we've increased his range so it's easier for him to find a way to enter combat."
changes.detailZh: 「高漸離放大招時，靠近越多敵人效果越好，因此我們提高了他的減傷效果，讓他存活的時間更長；同時提升射程以便他更容易獲得切入機會。」

changes.detail: "Dian Wei's skills allow him to clear enemy crowd control effects. We've reduced his own crowd control effects to give the enemy a chance to escape from his attack range."
changes.detailZh: 「典韋的技能可以解除敵方的控制效果，本次我們降低了他的控制效果，讓敵方有機會離開他的攻擊範圍。」

changes.detail: The enhanced Basic Attack's dash prevented Dian Wei from fully utilizing his Attack Range advantage and would even put him in danger in some situations. Hence, we have improved this mechanic so the dash effect remains the same without a target.
changes.detailZh: 「強化普攻的突進會讓典韋無法充分利用攻擊距離的優勢，甚至在某些場景下會讓典韋意外衝入人群，我們改善了這一機制，同時讓突進效果在沒有目標時也能夠統一。」

changes.detail: "Ming will often find himself standing in front of teammates drawing fire as he buffs them. As such, we've slightly increased the recovery he gets from his Passive to give him a bit more room to breathe in battle."
changes.detailZh: 「明世隱在增強隊友的同時，往往還要在隊友身前吸引火力；我們略微提高了他被動的自身回復效果，讓他在戰鬥中更加從容。」

changes.detail: Buffed base Physical Defense.
changes.detailZh: 增强基础物理防御

changes.detail: "Han Xin's Skill 2 interrupting his Passive has been a huge pain point for players for a long time now. We've addressed the issue in this update. Additionally, we've enhanced his Passive's effects. Now, the Passive and Skill 2 work together to create a stronger combined effect."
changes.detailZh: 「一直以來，2技能打斷被動都是操作韓信的一大痛點，本次改善了這一點，同時升級被動效果，讓兩者能互相加成。」

changes.changeZh: 調整了4技能的隱身機制
changes.detail: Prince of Lanling's stealth ability puts pressure on the opponent, even if he's leaving or only passing through. We've improved the indicator so that opponents can gauge his distance based on the blinking speed, giving them room to focus on the crucial moment.
changes.detailZh: 「蘭陵王在隱身狀態下總能為對手帶來一定危機感，哪怕有時他已經離開或只是路過。本次我們改善了提醒效果，讓對手可以根據提示的閃爍頻率判斷距離遠近，進而把注意力集中在最關鍵的時刻。」

changes.change: Balanced the effects of different presets.
changes.changeZh: 平衡不同場景和路線的強度
changes.detail: Previously, we tried reducing Skill 2's cooldown time. Multiple dashes made Kongming hard to counter if his team was winning, but Skill 2 would lack damage output if his team was at a disadvantage. Hence, we've changed the number of stocks Skill 1 and Skill 2 can hold to make Kongming more consistent in various situations and lanes.
changes.detailZh: 「上一次調整我們降低了2技能的冷卻時間，多次的位移使得諸葛亮在獲得優勢之後很難對抗，但如果逆風則很難依賴2技能造成傷害，因此我們調整了1技能和2技能的儲存數量，平衡不同場景和不同路線下的表現。」

changes.detail: "As a tank support, it's Liu Shan's job to take damage in the frontline, while also trying to crowd control enemies. We've reduced his skill cooldowns to improve his performance in both areas."
changes.detailZh: 「作為坦克輔助，劉禪需要在前排承受傷害，同時嘗試控制對手；我們降低了他的技能冷卻時間，提升這兩項能力。」

changes.detail: Luna is typically forced to leave the battlefield if her Ultimate fails. We have changed Luna's Basic Attack to allow her to contribute ranged damage while looking for a chance to return to battle.
changes.detailZh: 「如果露娜大招失誤，那麼她往往只能離開戰場。我們調整了露娜的普攻方式，讓她可以透過遠程攻擊提供傷害，同時尋找再次入場的機會。」

changes.change: Reduced Skill 2's cooldown and slightly decreased its damage.
changes.changeZh: 降低2技能的冷卻時間，略微削弱傷害
changes.detail: This allows Mai Shiranui to use her Skill 2 more frequently, while balancing its damage to prevent instant kills.
changes.detailZh: 「讓不知火舞有更多嘗試2技能的機會，同時削弱了傷害降低對手被秒殺的體驗。」

changes.change: Basic Attacks and skills deal true damage when enhanced and gain Physical Pierce when not enchanted.
changes.changeZh: 強化時普攻和技能造成真實傷害，未附魔時增加物理穿透
changes.detail: True damage is the highlight of Lu Bu's playstyle, but it's not always possible to enchant his weapon. Therefore, we have added a new mechanic so Lu Bu can deal more damage when unenchanted.
changes.detailZh: 「大量真實傷害是呂布的重要精彩體驗，但不是每次都有機會讓武器附魔；因此我們加入了新的機制，讓呂布在未附魔狀態下的傷害有所提升。」

changes.change: Increased BA range, reduced Skill 1 CD in early game
changes.changeZh: 提升普攻射程，降低1技能前期冷卻
changes.detail: Liu Bei's shotgun is most effective up close, and Skill 1 is his core damage and mobility skill, so we have reduced its cooldown in the early game to improve his leveling efficiency. The range of his shotgun has also been increased to give him some mid-range coverage.
changes.detailZh: 「劉備在接近對手時可以發揮出霰彈槍的最大威力，其中1技能作為移動和輸出的核心主要技能，我們適當降低了前期的冷卻來提升他的發育效率；同時霰彈槍的射程升級也能讓他兼顧一定的中距離作戰能力。」

changes.change: Reduced the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2 in the late game
changes.changeZh: 降低1、2技能後期的冷卻時間
changes.detail: "Fuzi's passive ability to reduce the cooldown of his Skills 1 and 2 with his Basic Attack is an important part of his performance. However, in the late game team fights, he doesn't have much time left for Basic Attacks. As such, we've reduced the cooldown of his Skills 1 and 2 in the late game to increase his chances of survival."
changes.detailZh: 「老夫子透過被動降低的1技能和2技能冷卻是他的重要技巧，而在後期團戰中留給他普通攻擊的時間並不多。因此我們降低了1技能和2技能後期的冷卻，提升他存活的可能性。」

changes.change: Reduced Skill 1 damage, standardized Ultimate effects
changes.changeZh: 降低1技能傷害，統一大招開啟關閉效果
changes.detail: "Garo's recent performance in the Farm Lane has been too good, as the range and early-game damage from her Skill 1 make it easy for her to gain an advantage during the laning stage. As such, we've reduced the skill's damage. At the same time, we've also standardized the effects of using and ending her Ultimate to make things easier to understand."
changes.detailZh: 「伽羅近期在發育路的表現過於突出了，1技能的射程和前期傷害讓她很容易獲得對線的優勢，我們適當降低了1技能傷害；大招在開啟和關閉時效果的也有些難以理解，於是我們將該效果進行了統一。」

changes.change: Casting speed of Skill 2 increases with Attack Speed.
changes.changeZh: 2技能施法速度隨攻速提升縮減
changes.detail: "A fixed casting time made it increasingly dangerous for Garo to use this skill in the late game. Now, her Skill 2's casting speed increases with her Attack Speed."
changes.detailZh: 「固定的施法時間讓伽羅在後期施放技能變得更加危險，因此我們讓她的2技能施放速度隨著攻速提升變得更快。」

changes.detail: "Nezha often initiates team fights, which also means that he tends to draw the enemy's firepower. As such, we've enhanced his base stats so that he can survive until his teammates arrive to help."
changes.detailZh: 「哪吒團戰中往往一馬當先，很容易吸引敵方的全部火力，我們適當提高他的基礎屬性，讓他能夠等到隊友的支援和配合。」

changes.detail: Menki can't speak, but we all know it wants to become even stronger.
changes.detailZh: 「雖然夢奇不說，我們都知道夢奇想在王者峽谷裡表現得更好。」

changes.detail: "We're making Menki's stats match up better with his Mass."
changes.detailZh: 讓夢奇的屬性更加符合他的質量。

changes.changeZh: 提供不同出裝和打法風格
changes.detail: "Previously, players using Shouyue had a hard time choosing between sniping from a distance and using Basic Attacks at a closer range. Now, we've upgraded his skills to give our players more equipment options. At the same time, with the same set of equipment, players can now mix long-range sniping with Basic Attacks more effectively."
changes.detailZh: 「過去的百里守約很難在遠程狙擊和近距離普攻之間做出抉擇，本次我們升級了他的技能，希望他能夠有更多出裝選擇；同時，在同一套出裝下，能夠讓遠程狙擊和普攻之間產生更多搭配。」

changes.change: Increased base Physical Defense and reduced the cooldown of Skill 2.
changes.changeZh: 提高基礎物理防禦，縮減二技能冷卻時間
changes.detail: Increased base Physical Defense and reduced the cooldown of Skill 2.
changes.detailZh: 提高基礎物理防禦，縮減二技能冷卻時間

changes.change: Reduced skill cooldown and enhanced the range and casting mechanics of her Skill 1
changes.changeZh: 降低技能冷卻，提升了1技能的距離和施放手感
changes.detail: "Daji is a mage that can deal impressive amounts of burst damage against single targets. However, whether she can obtain enough resources in the early game often determines her overall performance in the match. In order to help her along, we've shortened her skill cooldowns so that she can pull off more kills in the early game."
changes.detailZh: 「妲己作為具有單體高爆發的法師，在前期能否獲得足夠的經濟，往往決定整場戰局的表現；因此我們適當縮短前期技能冷卻，讓她能有更多嘗試獲得擊殺的機會。」

changes.change: Increased base Movement Speed and the early game damage of Skill 1's tokens.
changes.changeZh: 提升基礎移速和1技能令牌前期傷害
changes.detail: "Magistrate Di has been lying low for a while, it's time for him to bring judgment to his opponents."
changes.detailZh: 「狄大人已經蟄伏一段時間了，是時候去審判他的對手了。」

changes.change: Improved the and healing and prgression of his passive, and upgraded the second stage of Skill 1.
changes.changeZh: 增加被動的成長和回復，1技能二段效果升級
changes.detail: "The fixed cooldown of his passive limited Ukyo Tachibana's late game damage output, so we have adjusted its scaling to allow it to interact better with his skills. At the same time, we have lowered the unlock conditions for the second stage of his Skill 1, improving his flexibility to some extent."
changes.detailZh: 「固定的被動間隔限制了橘右京後期的輸出能力，因此我們提高了被動的成長性，使其能與技能相互配合；同時我們降低了1技能二段的解鎖條件，提高他的靈活程度。」

changes.change: Increased Skill 2's bounces, reduced Skill 1 CD
changes.changeZh: 調整2技能彈射次數，降低1技能冷卻
changes.detail: Lady Zhen's bounce attacks perform well during small team fights in the early to mid game. To better pace her power level and make it last until the late game, we've changed the number of bounces her Skill 2 has. We've also reduced the cooldown of her Skill 1 to give her more opportunities to freeze enemies and protect herself in the early game.
changes.detailZh: 「甄姬的彈射在前中期小規模團戰中有不錯的表現，我們調整了2技能的彈射次數，略微延緩她發威的時間，並保證她在後期能維持好表現；同時我們降低1技能前期的冷卻時間，讓她有更多嘗試冰凍敵人以及自保的機會。」

changes.change: Balanced Stats to Suit Different Equipment
changes.detail: "We've made adjustments to Musashi's skill stat bonuses to balance the effectiveness of various equipment builds."
changes.detailZh: 「調整宮本武藏技能的屬性加成，平衡不同套裝下的強度。」

changes.change: Increased base Movement Speed and Skill 1's late game cooldown.
changes.changeZh: 提升基礎移速，增加1技能後期冷卻
changes.detail: "Zhou Yu needs some preparation to fully ignite the battlefield. We've slightly increased his mobility to help him find the right positioning and angles. At the same time, we've slightly increased the late game cooldown of his Skill 1, giving opponents a fair chance to dodge it."
changes.detailZh: 「周瑜需要提前準備才能讓戰場徹底燃燒，我們略微提高他的移動能力讓他能尋找更好的位置和角度；同時略微降低了1技能後期的冷卻，給對手一定躲避的空間。」

changes.change: Increased damage output of enhanced Basic Attack and Ultimate
changes.changeZh: 提升強化普攻與大招的輸出
changes.detail: "While Lian Po already provides great crowd control, we also want him to pose a greater threat damage wise."
changes.detailZh: 「廉頗在提供控制的同時造成更多的傷害威脅。」

changes.detail: "Currently, Wuyan's ability to hit the enemy with the center of her Skill 2 attack plays a huge part in her overall performance, so we've made adjustments to help her perform more consistently across different situations. At the same time, we've made adjustments to her skills' stat bonuses to give players more options in terms of her equipment."
changes.detailZh: 「目前鍾無艷是否能用2技能中心區域命中敵人，大大決定了她的表現，因此我們縮減了不同情形的差異；同時調整了技能的屬性加成結構，讓她能有不同的出裝嘗試。」

changes.change: Passive's extra damage now applies to minions
changes.changeZh: 被動的額外傷害會對小兵生效
changes.detail: "As he is a marksman, we want his passive to also apply to minions to increase his farming speed, rather than only being effective when he's jungling."
changes.detailZh: 「作為射手，我們希望他的被動也能對小兵生效，以提升他的發育速度，而不是僅僅當他身處打野位置上才生效。」

changes.changeZh: 增加更多的技能嘗試次數
changes.detail: "Gan & Mo can deal extremely high damage after activating their Ultimate, but if they miss, they'll be more or less harmless for a short period of time. To alleviate this, we're giving them more chances to deal damage, and allowing them to more freely choose a comfortable attack range."
changes.detailZh: 「干將莫邪放大招後傷害非常高，但一旦失手，短期內很難造成傷害。因此，我們給了他們更多的嘗試機會，並讓他們更自由地選擇舒適的輸出距離。」

changes.change: Reduced Skill 1 cooldown, adjusted damage structure.
changes.changeZh: 降低1技能冷卻，調整傷害結構
changes.detail: "Arthur's mobility and the silence effect on his Skill 1 are crucial for his playstyle. The initial cooldown of this skill has been a bit too long, so we're reducing it to give Arthur more flexibility in skill upgrades."
changes.detailZh: 「1技能加速效果關乎亞瑟的機動性，沉默效果也能夠對敵人形成一定的限制；目前1技能的初始冷卻時間有點太長了，因此我們適當降低前期的冷卻時間，讓亞瑟在技能升級的選擇上有更多靈活性。」

changes.change: Reduced cooldown and made it easier to maintain passive stacks.
changes.changeZh: 降低技能冷卻和保持被動層數的難度
changes.detail: "Charlotte's passive wears off over time, which wastes her previous efforts. We've made it easier for her to maintain her passive, hoping she can perform better."
changes.detailZh: 「夏洛特被動隨時間削減後，也會浪費她之前的努力。我們降低她保持被動的難度，期望她能有更好的表現。」

changes.change: Reduced Ultimate cooldown and increased passive base damage.
changes.changeZh: 降低大招冷卻，提升被動的基礎傷害
changes.detail: "Wukong has been underperforming lately. His enhanced Basic Attack, being his primary damage source, relies heavily on completing his equipment. We're increasing the Growth of his enhanced Basic Attack, so he can still pose a threat even when behind."
changes.detailZh: 「孫悟空已經沉寂一段時間了，強化普攻作為其最主要的輸出來源，非常依賴裝備的成型；因此我們適當提高了強化普攻的成長，讓他即使在逆風時也能向對手構成一定程度的威脅。」

changes.change: Improved base Physical Defense and balanced Ultimate's late game damage
changes.changeZh: 提高基礎物理防禦，平衡大招前後期傷害
changes.detail: Improved base Physical Defense and balanced Ultimate's late game damage
changes.detailZh: 提高基礎物理防禦，平衡大招前後期傷害

changes.change: Increased damage from Skill 1 and reduced Skill 2 charge time.
changes.changeZh: 提升1技能傷害，降低2技能儲存時間
changes.detail: "Increasing Kongming's damage while reducing his dash skill's charge time to make him more flexible."
changes.detailZh: 「提升諸葛亮的傷害，同時降低位移技能的儲存時間，使其更加靈活。」

changes.change: Increased shield from Skill 1 when using defensive equipment.
changes.changeZh: 提升1技能在防禦出裝下的護盾
changes.detail: "We want Liu Shan's survivability to be more connected with his equipment choices."
changes.detailZh: 「我們希望劉禪的生存能力，能夠與出裝選擇有一定的關聯。」

changes.change: Increased the area of Skill 1 and 3, and enhanced Skill 2.
changes.changeZh: 增加1、3技能範圍，強化2技能效果
changes.detail: "We strengthened Da Qiao's own growth to make it possible for her to appear in more positions."
changes.detailZh: 「加強大喬自身的成長，讓大喬有出現在更多位置的可能性。」

changes.detail: Work hard and get stronger, Xiao Qiao.
changes.detailZh: 「小喬，要努力變強。」

changes.change: Balanced early and late game strength, and made it harder to repeatedly use enhanced Basic Attacks
changes.changeZh: 平衡前後期強度，避免連續使用強化普攻
changes.detail: "The mechanism that let Lam's enhanced Basic Attack reduce Skill 2's cooldown by a fixed amount allowed Lam to spam his Skill 2 and enhanced Basic Attack in the late game. This made it difficult for opponents to counter him, a situation that we hope to improve with these adjustments. At the same time, we have moderately increased the base effects of his skills to enhance the experience for newer players."
changes.detailZh: 「降低固定冷卻時間的機制，讓瀾在後期可能有連續使用2技能和強化普攻的情況，會讓對手很難與他對抗，我們希望改善這一現象；同時適當提升技能的基礎效果，提升新上手玩家的體驗。」

changes.change: Reduced Energy Cost for Skill 2 and the Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: 降低2技能和3技能的能量消耗
changes.detail: "Currently, even when Mai Shiranui has full Energy, missing with a skill can prevent her from completing her full skill combos. We slightly reduced Energy Cost to alleviate this issue."
changes.detailZh: 目前不知火舞即使在能量全滿時，也會因為技能未命中而無法施放完整連招，我們稍微調降能量消耗來緩解這種情況。

changes.change: Passive's CD reduces with level, adjusted shield multiplier
changes.changeZh: 被動冷卻隨等級成長而降低，調整護盾係數
changes.detail: In the mid to late game, most heroes' skills get shorter cooldowns and higher DPS. The cooldown of Yaria's passive feels quite long in comparison, so we've reduced its cooldown per hero level. The effect of Yaria's shield will now also vary based on the target.
changes.detailZh: 「相較於中後期對手技能冷卻的縮減和傷害的提高，瑤的被動技能觸發間隔顯得有點太長，因此我們調整了隨等級成長的冷卻時間；同時瑤的護盾也會隨著保護的目標而發生改變。」

changes.change: Increased base stats and Ultimate damage
changes.changeZh: 提高基礎屬性與大招傷害
changes.detail: "We hope that Sun Ce's Ultimate will not only serve as a way to assist teammates, but also provide some extra damage in his combos."
changes.detailZh: 「希望孫策的大招不僅作為支援的手段，也能在連招中時有更顯著的傷害效果。」

changes.detail: "Diaochan is one of only a few mages who have to get up close and personal with her enemies. This leaves her more vulnerable to attacks, so we've enhanced her base stats in order to help her shine."
changes.detailZh: 「作為法師，貂蟬是為數不多需要在人群中起舞的，因此也面臨著更多危險；我們適當提高她的基礎屬性，讓她有更多展示精華表現的可能性。」

changes.change: Made cooldown reduction for Skill 2 smoother.
changes.detail: "Diaochan's Skill 2 provides a significant cooldown reduction when hitting enemies, but it can be very frustrating when a miss disrupts follow-up combos.  In order to alleviate this, we've made the cooldown reduction mechanism more continuous."
changes.detailZh: 貂蟬的2技能命中敵人時，會有很高的冷卻返還收益，但失手時也會帶給玩家很強的挫敗感，影響後續的技能銜接。我們嘗試將2技能冷卻返還機制由離散變得更連續，提升貂蟬玩家的使用體驗。

changes.change: Increased shield and healing when using defensive equipment.
changes.changeZh: 提升防禦出裝下的護盾和回復
changes.detail: Increased shield and healing when using defensive equipment.
changes.detailZh: 提升防禦出裝下的護盾和回復

changes.change: Reduced his ability to deal sustained damage with his Basic Attack.
changes.changeZh: 降低普通攻擊的持續輸出能力
changes.detail: "Augran could consistently continue to deal damage in between attacks from his opponents. We're reducing his sustained damage output to prevent opponents from being taken down too early."
changes.detailZh: 大司命能夠在對方的攻擊間隙持續造成傷害，我們適當削弱他的持續輸出能力，使對手不會太早遭到斬殺。

changes.change: Removed Skill 1's knockback effect on distant enemies.
changes.changeZh: 移除1技能對遠處敵人的擊退效果
changes.detail: "Dolia's Skill 1 already damages and slows enemies in a wide area. By removing the knockback effect for distant targets, we aim to reduce her ability to poke and interrupt enemies."
changes.detailZh: 「朵莉亞的1技能可以造成大範圍的傷害和減速效果，我們適當回收遠端的控制效果，以降低她的消耗和打斷能力。」

changes.changeZh: 提升大招攻擊力和護盾量
changes.detail: Do no evil no matter how small, and do not avoid doing good no matter how small.
changes.detailZh: 「勿以惡小而為之，勿以善小而不為。」

changes.detail: Luban No.7 has been outperforming other marksmen for a long time, so it's time to tone him down a bit.
changes.detailZh: 「魯班七號的強度已經領先其他射手很久了，該是緩和這股氣焰的時候了。」

changes.change: Adjusted Passive effect's damage against different targets.
changes.changeZh: 調整被動對不同目標的傷害
changes.detail: Luban's Passive works the same regardless of the target's Health, so heroes cannot guard against it by increasing their Health. As such, we've reduced his effectiveness against high-Health targets. As compensation, we've increased his ability to threaten the enemy carry
changes.detailZh: 「被動對不同生命值的目標一視同仁，提高生命值在面對魯班七號時無法提高生存能力，因此我們適當削弱他對高生命值目標的傷害能力。作為補償，我們提升了他對全輸出C位目標的威脅。」

changes.change: The cooldown is returned if no heroes are hit by his Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: 大招未命中英雄時歸還冷卻時間
changes.detail: When Zilong's Ultimate fails to hit the enemy, he struggles to put pressure on them, so we want to improve his cooldown mechanics to give him more opportunities to engage in team fights. We also improved his late-game cooldowns, giving the opponent time to counterattack after being hit by an Ultimate.
changes.detailZh: 趙雲的大招若未命中敵人時，他對敵人的威脅性就會降低很多，因此我們希望最佳化大招的冷卻機制，讓趙雲能夠有更多嘗試開戰的機會；與此同時提升了後期的冷卻，在大招命中後，能留給對手一定的反制空間。

changes.change: Reduced the extra damage ratio to shields.
changes.changeZh: 降低對護盾的額外傷害比例
changes.detail: "Garo's passive gives her a significant advantage when facing opponents with shields. We've reduced this advantage to balance her strength against different opponents while also improving the experience for shielded heroes when facing Garo."
changes.detailZh: 伽羅的被動讓她在面對有護盾的對手時會取得較大的優勢，我們適度降低此比例，以平衡在面對不同對手時的強度，同時也提升護盾英雄面對伽羅時的體驗。

changes.detail: Increasing Skill 1's damage allows Li Bai to deal good damage before he gets his Ultimate
changes.detailZh: 「提升1技能的傷害，讓李白即使沒有大招，也能有不俗的傷害。」

changes.change: Increased Movement Speed and early game base stats, reduced mobility in Revenge form.
changes.changeZh: 提升移速和前期基礎屬性，削弱狂暴形態的機動性
changes.detail: Li Xin is rather weak right now, but his Revenge form is very hard to counter. We've boosted his stats in both his forms, especially in the early game, but we've reduced his mobility in Revenge form to make it easier for opponents to chase him down
changes.detailZh: 「李信目前的強度偏低，但狂暴形態帶線卻讓對手很難反制；我們提升他全形態（尤其是前期）的屬性，但削弱狂暴形態的機動性，留給對手追上他的可能性。」

changes.changeZh: 降低1技能和3技能的冷卻時間
changes.detail: "Currently, Dharma is relatively weak, so we've reduced the cooldown of his Ultimate to give him more opportunities to knock opponents into walls. Since his Skill 2's stationary punch is difficult to land on agile opponents, we've shortened the stock time for his Skill 1, allowing him to better adjust the position of his Skill 2."
changes.detailZh: 目前達摩強度偏低，我們降低他大招的冷卻時間，給他更多的機會嘗試將對手擊退到牆體上；2技能原地揮拳很難命中靈活的對手，因此我們縮短1技能儲存時間，讓他能更好地調整2技能的位置。

changes.change: Increased the duration of Ultimate's Mark.
changes.detail: "The Mark from Butterfly's Ultimate is a crucial mechanic. We've increased the duration of the Mark to give her more room for error and better leverage this feature."
changes.detailZh: 大招的標記是刀鋒寶貝的重要機制，我們提升了印記的持續時間，希望給她更多的容錯空間來利用這個特點。

changes.change: Increased Ultimate's cooldown in the early and mid game.
changes.changeZh: 增加大招前中期的冷卻時間
changes.detail: "Angela has powerful burst damage, and her skill cooldowns are relatively short, allowing her to use skill combos to frequently obliterate opponents. We've increased the cooldown time of her Ultimate in the early and mid game to slightly slow down her pace during these stages."
changes.detailZh: 安琪拉具備強力爆發傷害，且技能冷卻時間也相對較短，這讓她可以頻繁的嘗試連招秒人，我們增加其前中期大招的冷卻時間，適度放緩她在前中期的節奏。

changes.change: Increased base stats and Skill 1 damage
changes.changeZh: 提高基礎屬性和一技能傷害
changes.detail: While Yao's combat style relies on him being able to freely move in and out of battle, his current stats don't really enable him to do this well. So, we increased them to allow him greater freedom to enter and exit fights.
changes.detailZh: 曜目前的屬性無法支撐他進退自如的戰鬥風格，因此我們提高他的屬性讓他更有信心切入和退場。

changes.detail: Erin can explore both physical and magic equipment. We're improving her base stats to ensure she remains strong under different playstyles.
changes.detailZh: 「艾琳可以探索物理或法術出裝，我們提高她的基礎屬性，希望保證她在不同流派下的基礎強度。」

changes.change: Increased damage reduction while wielding the heavy sword and the damage of Skill 1 when wielding both heavy and dual swords.
changes.changeZh: 增加重劍形態的免傷效果，同時提升1技能在輕劍和重劍形態的傷害
changes.detail: We made Mulan tankier while wielding her heavy sword and increased her overall damage output. Hopefully she will now perform better in team fights
changes.detailZh: 「提升花木蘭重劍的坦度和整體輸出能力，希望她在團戰中有更好的表現。」

changes.change: Reduced early game strength while allowing her to use Skill 2 more frequently in the late game
changes.changeZh: 降低前期強度，適當提升後期二技能頻率

changes.change: Increased number of Skill 1 sound waves, base damage, and jungling effectiveness
changes.changeZh: 提升1技能的音波數量和基礎傷害及打野效率
changes.detail: Her smile could melt your heart. The powdered faces of all the ladies-in-waiting paled in comparison
changes.detailZh: 「回眸一笑百媚生，六宮粉黛無顏色。」

changes.change: Balanced the strength of different builds.
changes.changeZh: 平衡不同出裝下的強度
changes.detail: "Currently, Kaizer's overall strength is too high, especially when he purchases a lot of defensive equipment, making it difficult for opponents to counter him. Therefore, we've slightly reduced his strength when using defensive builds while maintaining his power with offensive builds."
changes.detailZh: 目前鎧的整體強度偏高，尤其在購買較多防禦裝備時，對手難以與其抗衡，因此我們適度降低了鎧出防禦套裝的強度，同時確保他在攻擊出裝下的強度。

changes.change: Reduced mid to late game damage and lowered the slow effect of Ultimate during the early and mid game.
changes.changeZh: 降低中後期傷害，降低大招前中期的減速效果
changes.detail: Lady Zhen has strong area crowd control and continuous poking capabilities. Her Skill 1 also enhances survivability. We are slightly reducing her damage output and crowd control to allow other heroes to better compete against her.
changes.detailZh: 「甄姬擁有強大的團控能力和持續消耗能力，同時1技能也可以提升生存能力，我們些微削弱了輸出和控制，使其他英雄能夠與她抗衡。」

changes.change: Slightly improved laning in the early game, but weakened poking in the late game.
changes.changeZh: 略微增強前期清線能力，削弱後期消耗能力
changes.detail: Lady Zhen is a mage with exceptional damage and crowd control. In the current version of the game, she is clearly a bit too powerful. We hope to reduce Lady Zhen's domination in the mid to late game and, while lowering her damage and poke ability in the late game, adequately supplement her lane clearing in the early game.
changes.detailZh: 甄姬是一名傷害能力和控制能力都非常出色的法師，在目前版本的遊戲中，她顯得有些過於強大了。我們希望降低甄姬在遊戲中後期的統治地位，削弱她後期傷害和消耗能力，同時適度補充她前期的清線能力。

changes.change: Increased Skill 2's damage over time and recovery and reduced late game stock time.
changes.changeZh: 提升2技能的持續傷害和回復，降低後期的儲存時間
changes.detail: "Zhou Yu's Skill 2 provides damage over time and recovery. We aim to strengthen this playstyle appropriately while adjusting the cooldown between early and late game to balance his power throughout the match."
changes.detailZh: 周瑜2技能提供他持續傷害和回復能力，我們希望適度強化此作戰風格，同時調整了前後期的冷卻時間以平衡前後期的強度

changes.change: Reduced cooldown for Skill 1 and Ultimate, and increased Ultimate's healing.
changes.changeZh: 降低1技能和3技能冷卻，增加3技能回血
changes.detail: Yang Jian often needs to dash into the enemy crowd. We've increased his Ultimate's recovery amount and frequency to help him sustain longer in combat.
changes.detailZh: 「楊戩的技能需要經常突進到敵群之中，我們提升他的大招回復量和頻率以便持續作戰。」

changes.change: Added a dash to his Skill 1 and reduced the extra true damage from his Ultimate
changes.changeZh: 一技能增加突進效果，下調大招附加的真實傷害
changes.detail: Dian Wei's high Attack Speed and recovery allow him to fight for sustained periods of time. However, without a dash, it's difficult for him to chase and approach enemies who have movement skills. That's why we decided to add a dash to his enhanced Basic Attack while making a minor adjustment to the extra true damage dealt by his Ultimate.
changes.detailZh: 典韋可以透過高攻速和高回血持續戰鬥，缺少位移手段讓他很難接近和追擊有位移的對手，因此我們為他的強化普攻增加了突進效果，同時我們略微下調大招開啟後附加的真實傷害比例。

changes.detail: Huang Zhong is still full of vigor, and we hope this change will make him more flexible in combat.
changes.detailZh: 「黃忠依然充滿活力，希望他在一般形態下能夠更加靈活地戰鬥。」

changes.change: Increased Basic Attack interval and reduced Ultimate's shield effect.
changes.changeZh: 增加普攻間隔，並降低大招的護盾效果
changes.detail: Allain's continuous Basic Attack and counterattack capabilities with his Ultimate have made him a strong contender in both the Clash Lane and team fights. We are slightly nerfing him to allow other heroes to better compete against him.
changes.detailZh: 「亞連持續普攻和透過大招的殘血反打能力，讓他經常能在對抗路和團戰中取得不錯的表現，我們略微削弱他，使其他英雄能夠與他抗衡。」

changes.change: Reduced the early game bonus to teammates.
changes.changeZh: 降低前期對隊友的屬性加成
changes.detail: "In the early game, Ming can boost his team's effectiveness when linking with allies, creating a whole that is greater than its parts and further magnifying any advantage gained. In order to alleviate this, we've slightly reduced the early game bonus he provides to allies."
changes.detailZh: 明世隱在前期連結隊友時能夠發揮1+1>2的效果，並進一步放大取得的優勢，因此我們適度削弱了前期對隊友的屬性加成效果。

changes.change: Reduced his Ultimate's cooldown and buffed his shield
changes.changeZh: 降低大招的冷卻時間，提高護盾效果
changes.detail: The interval between each use of Zhuangzi's Ultimate is too long. Also, his shield is often overlooked by his teammates. By buffing the shield, we've made Zhuangzi useful even if he is unable to cleanse teammates of crowd controls.
changes.detailZh: 莊周大招的使用間隔實在是太久了，而護盾往往會被大家忽略，因此我們適當提高了效果，讓他即使沒有成功解除控制，還是能保持不錯的效果。

changes.change: Added a launch effect to his Skill 1 and Skill 2 while he is transformed by his Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: 變身後的一技能二技能新增擊飛效果
changes.detail: We wanted to make his skills better match his massive body
changes.detailZh: 讓變身後的技能更配合他龐大的身軀

changes.change: Smoothed Attack Speed gains, improving growth.
changes.changeZh: 攻速收益曲線平滑化以確保成長體驗
changes.detail: Marco Polo's current Attack Speed benefits don't pay off much until the late game, so we gave the Attack Speed boost of his Skill 1 and Ultimate more specific tiering to ensure that early-game Attack Speed boosts provide a corresponding reward.
changes.detailZh: 馬可波羅目前攻速收益曲線過於陡峭，我們將1技能、3技能的攻速收益劃分成更細的檔位，確保前期的攻速提升也能帶來對應的收益。

changes.change: Ultimate damage and Skill 1 shield are increased, improving play from the beginning.
changes.changeZh: 提升大招傷害和1技能護盾，確保基礎體驗
changes.detail: Wukong is currently too weak, so we strengthened the shield of his Skill 1, giving him a stronger response when successfully blocking skills. Since his Ultimate is an important part of his skill combos, we also hope to adequately improve his early-game stats to ensure his playability from the start.
changes.detailZh: 孫悟空目前強度偏低，我們提升1技能的護盾讓他在成功抵擋技能時有更強的回饋感；同時大招作為連招重要組成部分，我們希望適當提高前期數值，確保他的基礎體驗。

changes.change: Increased base Health and Skill 1 damage, reduced Skill 1's early game CD.
changes.changeZh: 提升基礎生命值，增加1技能的傷害，並且降低前期冷卻值
changes.detail: Han Xin needs an economic advantage to be useful in team fights. We've adjusted his Skill 1 so that he can participate in team fights earlier, and we've boosted his Health to give him a wider margin of error in those team fights
changes.detailZh: 「韓信需要領先一定程度的經濟才有能力參與團戰，我們適當提高1技能的等級成長，讓他能夠更早參與團戰，並且適當提升生命值，藉此提高團戰的容錯率。」

changes.detail: Hou Yi's stable Basic Attack and ability to target multiple enemies at once make it hard for other marksmen to compete with him, so we've lowered the frequency of his Basic Attacks slightly to give his enemies time to catch their breath.
changes.detailZh: 后羿穩定的普攻輸出能力和多目標輸出能力讓其他射手難以抗衡，因此我們稍微降低了他的攻擊頻率，好留給對手一些喘息空間。

changes.changeZh: 2技能新增傷害，降低後期冷卻
changes.detail: "We've increased the damage of Lu Bu's Skill 2 to prevent opponents from escaping with low Health. His restoration and shield capabilities benefit much more from high-attack builds compared to survival-focused builds, so we've made adjustments accordingly."
changes.detailZh: 我們為呂布2技能增加了傷害，防止對手殘血逃跑；目前，呂布出高攻擊力套裝的恢復和護盾能力收益，會遠高於其出偏重生存能力的套裝，因此我們已加以調整。

changes.change: Reduced the continuous poke of Skill 1 and reduced the damage reduction when Ultimate is used.
changes.changeZh: 降低1技能持續消耗能力，降低大招施放期間的免傷效果
changes.detail: "Currently, Heino offers a poor counterplay experience for opponents. His Ultimate's high damage reduction and restoration allow him to continuously poke enemies while being difficult to counter. We've reduced his damage output and the room for error in his Ultimate, giving opponents more opportunities to counter him."
changes.detailZh: 目前海諾給對手的對抗體驗較差，大招高額的免傷和回復能力使其可以在敵方面前持續消耗且不容易受到反制，我們降低了他的輸出能力和大招容錯率，給對手更多的反制空間

changes.change: Increased base Movement Speed and reduced Skill 2's stock interval.
changes.changeZh: 提高基礎移速，降低二技能儲存間隔

changes.change: Increased Ultimate cooldown and reduced damage and recovery of Skill 2
changes.changeZh: 增加大招冷卻 減少2技能傷害與回復
changes.detail: Increased Ultimate cooldown and reduced damage and recovery of Skill 2
changes.detailZh: 增加大招冷卻 減少2技能傷害與回復

changes.detail: Arli's flexibility is her trademark, so we are reducing her early game cooldown to let her better showcase her strengths.
changes.detailZh: 「靈活是公孫離的特點，我們適當降低前期的冷卻時間，好好發揮她的特點。」

changes.change: We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
changes.changeZh: 提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
changes.detail:
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
We hope that players will be able to tell the difference between the heroes in the early game and fully understand their individual characteristics. This should help them choose the best hero for their team's lineup. We want tanks to soak up damage in the early game without becoming hard to counter in the late game. To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.
changes.detailZh:
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
我們希望在遊戲早期就能讓玩家區分各英雄間的差異和特點，從而根據陣容需求來選擇自己接下來要操控的英雄。我們希望坦克類英雄能在遊戲早期就承擔吸收傷害的職責，但是又不希望他們在遊戲後期變得難以處理，因此我們適當提升了部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，並降低了他們每次升級後帶來的生命成長。

changes.change: We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
changes.changeZh: 提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變

To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.

changes.change: Nerfed some Human Form and Tiger Form skills.
changes.changeZh: 適當降低人形態和虎形態下部分技能的強度
changes.detail:
Nerfed some Human Form and Tiger Form skills.
Pei has one of the highest win rates thanks to his high mobility and power in the jungle. Many other junglers find it hard to deal with early game incursions from Pei.We've reduced the power of some of his skills to close the gap between him and other heroes.
changes.detailZh:
適當降低人形態和虎形態下部分技能的強度
目前版本中，裴擒虎憑藉在野區的高機動性和戰鬥力穩居勝率榜前列，很多其他野區英雄前期遇到裴擒虎時毫無還手之力。我們適當降低了裴擒虎部分技能的效果，希望可以適當縮小其他英雄和裴擒虎之間的差距。

changes.change: Increased her Skill 1 damage.New: Ultimate skill combo usable in even more battle scenarios
changes.changeZh: 提高1技能傷害為大招新增一種連招方式，以用於應對更多戰鬥場景
changes.detail:
Increased her Skill 1 damage.New: Ultimate skill combo usable in even more battle scenarios
Ying's ability to effectively engage in combat has always relied heavily on the other heroes in her team. While in some lineups Ying does perform well, but in others, it can be a bit of a struggle for her.After a close study of Ying's match indicators over time, we've decided to make certain enhancements to her stats.We hope that these changes can help her perform better in a wider variety of lineups.
changes.detailZh:
提高1技能傷害。為大招新增一種連招方式，用於應對更多戰鬥場景
雲纓的戰鬥能力一直很依賴陣容搭配，有些陣容中雲纓確實表現的不錯，但是有些陣容表現又會稍顯掙扎。我們比較了雲纓的長期和多種數據表現，適度增強她。希望她能夠在更多陣容配置都能表現優異。

changes.change: Increased Skill 2's recovery, and reduced its damage accordingly.
changes.changeZh: 提升趙雲2技能的恢復效果，並適度降低2技能造成的傷害
changes.detail: Zilong is a very good all-rounder. Players can use different equipment based on different situations and lineups to give their Zilong various strengths. We adjusted his Skill 2 somewhat to increase his recovery and reduce his ability to deal sustained damage.
changes.detailZh: 趙雲是一名非常全面的英雄。玩家可以根據局勢，陣容搭配不同的裝備，來使得自己操控的趙雲獲得各式各樣的能力。我們適度調整了趙雲的2技能，使得他在獲得更強恢復能力的同時，適度降低其製造持續傷害的能力。

changes.change: Reduced the Physical Attack gained from his Passive, adjusted Skill 1 cooldown.
changes.changeZh: 降低被動提供的物理攻擊，調整1技能的冷卻時間
changes.detail:
Reduced the Physical Attack gained from his Passive, adjusted Skill 1 cooldown.
Ever since we adjusted the refresh mechanic for Li Bai's Passive, his power and win rate have gone up significantly. Now he farms faster and is able to participate in battles right from the early game.We've reduced the power of his Passive and adjusted his Skill 1's cooldown to keep him in his intended role as a late game hero.
changes.detailZh:
降低被動提供的物理攻擊，調整1技能的冷卻時間
自從我們調整了李白被動的重置機制後，李白在目前版本的強度和勝率有顯著提升。現在他在遊戲早期就能參戰，使其發育速度更快。我們適當降低了他被動技能的強度，並調整了他1技能的冷卻時間，希望讓李白更符合一名後期英雄的定位。

changes.change: We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
changes.changeZh: 提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
changes.detail:
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
We hope that players will be able to tell the difference between the heroes in the early game and fully understand their individual characteristics. This should help them choose the best hero for their team's lineup. We want tanks to soak up damage in the early game without becoming hard to counter in the late game. To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.
changes.detailZh:
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
我們希望在遊戲早期就能讓玩家區分各英雄間的差異和特點，從而根據陣容需求來選擇自己接下來要操控的英雄。我們希望坦克類英雄能在遊戲早期就承擔吸收傷害的職責，但是又不希望他們在遊戲後期變得難以處理，因此我們適當提升了部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，並降低了他們每次升級後帶來的生命成長。

changes.change: Increased basic Movement Speed.Increased Attack Speed to enhance Skill 1 and Ultimate effects, while slightly weakening Skill 2
changes.changeZh: 提升基礎移動速度。提升攻擊速度可以強化1技能和大招的效果，略微削弱2技能
changes.detail: As a late-game marksman, Consort Yu's original skill mechanics have made it increasingly difficult to support her position in the current environment.We hope that this update will make Consort Yu's Skill 1 an important part of her damage output in late-game team fights, while also improving the attack power of her Ultimate
changes.detailZh: 虞姬作為遊戲後期射手英雄之一，她原有的技能機制逐漸難以支撐她在當前環境中的地位。我們希望本次改動過後，虞姬的1技能可以在遊戲後期的團戰中作為她傷害重要的組成部分，同時讓她的大招可以更具攻擊性。

changes.change: Increased the skill damage bonus multiplier from her Passive
changes.changeZh: 調整被動技能中，對技能傷害提升的加成係數
changes.detail:
Increased the skill damage bonus multiplier from her Passive
Angela is a hero capable of dealing high burst damage. However, her strength in early and late game is currently somewhat unbalanced.We have thus made some changes to the base stats and bonus multiplier of her Passive.This ensures that while she won't be too powerful in early game, she can still deal more damage in late game.
changes.detailZh: 「安琪拉是一名爆發傷害很高的英雄，但是目前她在前期和後期的強度有些不夠均衡。因此我們調整她被動技能中的基礎數值和加成係數。確保她前期不會過於強大，同時提升她在後期戰鬥中的傷害。」

changes.detail: Mulan's two stances give her mobility, burst damage, crowd control, and damage reduction. She can be used in many different lineups to attack many different opponents.In the current version, when Mulan gains the advantage, she becomes very difficult to counter.We hope that by reducing her base Health, we can give her less room for mistakes.
changes.detailZh: 花木蘭的兩個形態使得她同時擁有機動性，爆發傷害，控制能力以及傷害減免能力，她可以適配很多陣容，應對很多對手。在當前版本中，花木蘭一旦獲取優勢就會變得難以反制。我們希望通過降低花木蘭的生命，來降低她的容錯性。

changes.change: Reduced the base damage from Princess Frost's Passive, and increased her equipment bonus multiplier.
changes.changeZh: 降低王昭君被動技能所造成的基礎傷害，提升裝備加成係數
changes.detail: Princess Frost has always shown good numbers during early-game, but she relies on teammates more and more during mid- to late-game, eventually becoming a hero that's mostly useful for her crowd controls and ability to guard towers. By adjusting her passive, we hope to change her predicament of being too powerful during the early game and repetitive during the late game.
changes.detailZh: 王昭君一直具備不錯的前期作戰能力，但是當遊戲行進至中後期時，王昭君反而會更加依賴隊友，從而變成一個單純的控制機器或守塔機器。我們希望通過調整她的被動技能，來改變她前期過強而後期體驗過分單調的處境。

changes.change: Increased cooldown reduction from enemy hit with Skill 2
changes.changeZh: 提升2技能命中敵人後返還的冷卻時間
changes.detail:
Increased cooldown reduction from enemy hit with Skill 2.
Given the fast pace of the current version, we've been working hard to ensure that more heroes can participate effectively in early game. By moderately enhancing Musashi's Skill 2, we hope to improve his mobility and damage tolerance in combat while not over-boosting his character at the same time.We hope this will lead to players using Musashi more often in matches.
changes.detailZh: 「目前版本的節奏很快，我們也一直致力於讓更多的英雄可以在對戰早期就參與到戰鬥中，我們希望透過適度強化宮本武藏的2技能，略微提升他在戰鬥中的機動性和傷害承受能力。確保不會把他調整得太強，同時讓他能獲得更多出場機會。」

changes.change: New Health recovery mechanic; skill stat values and bonus multipliers have also been adjusted to make Lian Po more suitable for his role as a frontline hero
changes.changeZh: 新增生命恢復機制，調整技能數值和加成係數，使廉頗更符合其作為前排英雄的定位
changes.detail:
New Health recovery mechanic; skill stat values and bonus multipliers have also been adjusted to make Lian Po more suitable for his role as a frontline hero.
As one of the heroes available to new players, Lian Po has been with our players through thick and thin over many versions.He shines in games where he has farmed adequately. However, in certain uphill scenarios, there can be precious little room for Lian Po to perform to his full potential.With these changes, we expect that users who use Lian Po will now have more equipment to choose from, as well as a better game experience in the new version.
changes.detailZh: 「廉頗作為新手英雄之一，伴隨著眾多玩家走過了很多個版本。在發育良好的對戰中，廉頗的表現不錯，而在某些逆風的局勢下，廉頗很難有發揮的空間。我們希望廉頗的玩家能在這次調整後，在新版本中擁有更加多樣的裝備選擇和更加良好的對戰體驗。」

changes.changeZh: 提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變

changes.change: Increased base Health, reduced Skill 1 cooldown, and increased shield granted by Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: 提升基礎生命，降低1技能冷卻，提升大招所提供的護盾值
changes.detail:
Increased base Health, reduced Skill 1 cooldown, and increased shield granted by Ultimate.
We've previously adjusted Wuyan's skill mechanics to give her more mobility.But looking at her win rate and pick rate, it's clear that she still needs to be more powerful.By boosting her base stats and strengthening some of her skills, we hope to make her much better able to fulfill her role as a fighter and tank.
changes.detailZh:
提升基礎生命，降低1技能冷卻，提升大招所提供的護盾值
之前我們調整了鍾無艷的技能機制，進一步增強了她的機動性。但從勝率及出場率來看，鍾無艷仍需一定的強度。我們希望透過增強她的基礎屬性和部分技能數值，使她在擔任戰士和坦克時能更加得心應手。

changes.change: Increased the recovery from Cai Yan's Skill 1 and Ultimate, and increased the defense provided by the Ultimate during late-game.
changes.changeZh: 提升蔡文姬1技能和大招的恢復效果，進一步提升大招在後期所提供的防禦屬性
changes.detail: Cai Yan provides great sustain and protection for her teammates as long as she can afford equipment, but she becomes less useful when her team is falling behind. To alleviate this, we increased her recovery effects and the defense provided by her Ultimate, so that she can be effective even before she has a lot of equipment.
changes.detailZh: 蔡文姬在獲取裝備優勢後可以為團隊提供不錯的持續作戰能力和保護能力，但是在某些處境不那麼樂觀的對局就很難發揮她應有的作用。我們提升了蔡文姬的恢復效果和大招提供的防禦屬性，確保她可以在尚未獲得大量裝備情況下也能發揮應有的作用。

changes.change: Reduced Dr Bian's early-game damage, and increased his healing and late-game damage
changes.changeZh: 降低扁鵲前期傷害製造能力，提升他的治療能力以及後期的傷害製造能力
changes.detail: n the current version, Dr Bian is extremely powerful during the early game. However, his lack of dash and crowd control skills makes him less powerful during in the late game. We hope to change that, so we will increase his late-game damage and healing, and reduce his early-game damage accordingly.
changes.detailZh: 扁鵲在當前版本的遊戲前期擁有極強的作戰能力，但是由於他缺少位移和控制能力，導致他後期的戰鬥強度會有所下降。我們希望改變扁鵲在遊戲中期開始越打越弱的處境，在強化他後期傷害和治療能力的同時適度降低他前期的戰鬥能力。

changes.change: Skill 1 and Ultimate Mana costs are increased, and the skill strength of his Ultimate is weakened, while reducing its CD.
changes.changeZh: 增加1技能和大招的法力消耗，削弱大招的技能強度但是降低其冷卻時間
changes.detail: Han Xin is well suited for the current game environment and pace of combat. His mobility can help him to quickly travel across the map to clean up monsters and enemies.Even when at a disadvantage, he can quickly clear minion waves to control the enemy.We hope that by increasing Han Xin's Mana Cost, as well as some of the core stats of his Ultimate, it will give his opponents the chance to counter what is a very powerful hero in the new version.
changes.detailZh: 韓信很適應當前的遊戲環境和戰鬥節奏，他的機動性可以幫助他在地圖中快速穿行，收割野怪和敵人。即便在相對逆風的情形下還可以通過快速清理兵線來牽制敵人。我們希望通過增加韓信的法力消耗，和他大招中的一些關鍵數值，使他的敵人可以有機會來反制這名在當前版本中非常強力的英雄

changes.changeZh: 提高劉禪使用1技能後的移動速度
changes.detail:
Increased Skill 1's Movement Speed bonus.
Liu Shan needs to set up ambushes in the brush or use his Skill 1 to help him crowd control. Right now there are too many heroes with powerful movement skills, which makes it hard for Liu Shan to approach them with his Skill 1. By increasing Skill 1's Movement Speed bonus, we hope to give his players more flexibility.
changes.detailZh:
提高劉禪使用1技能後的移動速度
劉禪需埋伏在草叢或使用1技能，才能發揮自身的控制能力，但是目前版本中，很多英雄的位移能力很強，讓劉禪很難以1技能接近敵人。我們希望透過調整劉禪1技能的移動速度加成效果，藉此提升劉禪使用者的操作空間。

changes.change: We wanted to preserve the original vision for how Da Qiao should play while expanding her role options and adjusting her skill stats.
changes.changeZh: 保留大喬原有設計想法和玩法，開拓她在遊戲中的位置選擇，並適當調整她的技能數值
changes.detail:
We wanted to preserve the original vision for how Da Qiao should play while expanding her role options and adjusting her skill stats.
As a roamer, Da Qiao provides her team with excellent tactical options. Unfortunately, because she relies so heavily on her teammates, her skill floor and ceiling are too far apart.By changing her skill mechanics, we hope to improve her soloing ability while maintaining her original role and playstyle.
changes.detailZh:
保留大喬原有設計想法和玩法，開拓她在遊戲中的位置選擇，並適當調整她的技能數值
身為遊走英雄，大喬可為團隊帶來與眾不同的戰術選擇，但是太過依賴隊友，使大喬的上下限差異過大。我們希望透過調整她的技能機制，既保留其原有定位和玩法，也讓她能更多憑藉自身能力對抗敵人、改變戰局。

changes.detail: As a classic mage hero in the game, Xiao Qiao can be a very effective counter against enemies with high mobility. After all, her Ultimate doesn't need accuracy to use.However, one of the biggest problems with Xiao Qiao in the current version is how she can obtain the equipment needed to support her and show her potential.So, we've increased the basic damage of her Skill 1 accordingly, allowing her to clear minion waves faster and giving her more opportunities to obtain the equipment she needs to support her.
changes.detailZh: 小喬作為遊戲中非常傳統的法師英雄，她對於一些機動性很強的敵人可以產生很好的克制效果，畢竟她的大招不需要瞄準。然而小喬在當前版本中最大的問題之一，是她如何能夠順利獲得一定的裝備支持併發揮她應有的強度。所以我們適當提高了她1技能的基礎傷害，這樣可以讓小喬更快地清理兵線，從而一定程度上保證了她有更多機會獲得必要的裝備支持。

changes.changeZh: 降低關羽衝鋒能量衰減速度
changes.detail:
Reduced Energy decay while charging.
Guan Yu isn't performing well, in large part because his Energy decays too fast while charging. This becomes very punishing if Guan Yu gets crowd controlled, or if his player slips up.We've reduced the Energy decay speed to give his unique mechanics more of a chance to shine.
changes.detailZh:
降低關羽衝鋒能量衰減速度
關羽目前版本表現不佳，某種程度上是因為他在受到控制，或其使用者操作失誤後，關羽衝鋒能力衰減速度過快造成的。我們降低了關羽衝鋒能量衰減速度，希望能讓這位機制獨特的英雄獲得更多表現機會。

changes.change: Improved her skill cast indicator to make the area of effect of some of her skills clearer. Skill 2 can now hit up to 2 enemies.
changes.changeZh: 優化技能施放指示器，使部分技能的生效範圍更加清晰。2技能現在可以最多命中2名敵人
changes.detail: Mai Shiranui is a hero with very complex controls, making her a very difficult hero to master.In the current version, Mai Shiranui's skill mechanics make it very difficult to escape her as she charges forward in the Mid Lane minion wave.We hope that the changes in the new version can help Mai Shiranui to better integrate into the current game environment and demonstrate her advantages.We hope this will give more players the chance to try this hero.
changes.detailZh: 不知火舞是一名操作上限很高的英雄，而相應的，她的練習成本同樣很高。而在當前的版本中，不知火舞原有的技能機制使得她很難在中路兵線的不斷推進中脫身。我們希望新版本中的調整可以讓不知火舞更好地融入到當前的遊戲環境中並發揮自身的優勢。讓更多的玩家可以有機會嘗試這名英雄。

changes.change: Increased recovery from his Ultimate under certain conditions, and increased recovery when his Skill 1 hits an enemy.
changes.changeZh: 增強大招在一定條件下的恢復效果，增強1技能命中敵人後的恢復效果
changes.detail: As a very powerful late-game hero, with the right equipment, Lu Bu has both very high damage potential and very high damage absorption potential. But in the early game, his power is a little low. Therefore, we've made some minor improvements to his recovery ability to make it easier for him to reach the mid to late game.
changes.detailZh: 呂布作為一名後期強度很高的英雄，在獲得一定的裝備支持後，他可以同時兼具很高的傷害製造能力和很高傷害吸收能力。但是在遊戲前期，他的強度有些不足。因此我們對他的恢復能力進行了小幅強化，保證他可以更好的過渡到遊戲中後期。

changes.changeZh: 適當降低貂蟬隨等級成長的生命值
changes.detail:
Reduced Health per level.
Diaochan is getting a lot of opportunities to farm, so she's reaching peak power very quickly.With the right equipment, she's very hard to counter.As such, we're reducing her base Health to give her a smaller margin of error.
changes.detailZh:
适当降低貂蝉随等级成长的生命值。
貂蝉在当前版本的节奏中可以获得更好的发育空间，从而更快地来到她的强势期。当貂蝉获得了一定的装备支持后，她将变得难以被反制。我们适度降低了她的基础生命，希望借此可以降低她的容错性

changes.change: Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
changes.changeZh: 提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
changes.detail:
Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
Dolia is currently underperforming, so we're boosting the stats of some of her skills and giving her an extra benefit for refreshing her teammates' skills.Hopefully this will make her more powerful and help her progress faster.
changes.detailZh:
提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
朵莉亞在目前版本的表現稍嫌普通，我們希望透過提升她部分技能的數值，並強化她重置友方英雄技能後的收益。藉此讓她獲得更高的戰鬥力和成長速度。

changes.change: Reduced the base damage of Luban No.7's passive skill, and increased the base cooldown of his Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: 降低魯班七號被動技能基礎傷害，提高大招基礎冷卻時間
changes.detail:
Reduced the base damage of Luban No.7's passive skill, and increased the base cooldown of his Ultimate.
With his unique damage capabilities, Luban No.7 has become a common choice for marksman players. He is easy to play and can rapidly tear through various types of enemy with ease. We have nerfed Luban No.7 in order to give rivals a fairer chance of getting close to him.
changes.detailZh:
降低魯班七號被動技能基礎傷害，提高大招基礎冷卻時間。
魯班七號在目前版本中，憑著獨一無二的傷害製造能力，成為許多射手玩家的常備選項。他往往只需要簡單的操作，就可以在短時間內輕鬆撕碎面前所有類型的敵人。我們希望能適當削弱魯班七號，來讓魯班七號的對手有更多機會來接近他。

changes.change: We've retained Zilong's original design and gameplay while upgrading his passive and active skill mechanics. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
changes.changeZh: We've retained Zilong's original design and gameplay while upgrading his passive and active skill mechanics. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
changes.detail:
We've retained Zilong's original design and gameplay while upgrading his passive and active skill mechanics. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
Zilong is a characteristic versatile hero, with dash skills, damage reduction, and recovery capabilities. He can deal both burst damage and damage over time. However, as the game environment evolves and players improve, his easy-to-use skill mechanics are ceasing to be an advantage. We have thus added new mechanics to his skill set, while retaining his core gameplay. It is our hope that this will make Zilong a trusted choice for players in higher-level matches.
changes.detailZh:
We've retained Zilong's original design and gameplay while upgrading his passive and active skill mechanics. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
Zilong is a characteristic versatile hero, with dash skills, damage reduction, and recovery capabilities. He can deal both burst damage and damage over time. However, as the game environment evolves and players improve, his easy-to-use skill mechanics are ceasing to be an advantage. We have thus added new mechanics to his skill set, while retaining his core gameplay. It is our hope that this will make Zilong a trusted choice for players in higher-level matches.

changes.change: Made it easier to extend the duration of his Passive Skill's enhancement effect, and adjusted the damage bonus of his Skill 2.
changes.changeZh: Made it easier to extend the duration of his Passive Skill's enhancement effect, and adjusted the damage bonus of his Skill 2.
changes.detail: As a hero with a great deal of potential, Li Bai requires a lot of time and Gold to buy equipment and become the best that he can be. However, we hope players will find him to be a high-risk, high-reward hero. With these adjustments, Li Bai will be able to participate more frequently in battles in the early game.
changes.detailZh: As a hero with a great deal of potential, Li Bai requires a lot of time and Gold to buy equipment and become the best that he can be. However, we hope players will find him to be a high-risk, high-reward hero. With these adjustments, Li Bai will be able to participate more frequently in battles in the early game.

changes.change: We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
changes.detail:
We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
When Agudo uses her Ultimate and releases Furball to attack enemies, her squishy body becomes her weakness.Risks should always be accompanied by rewards, so we have appropriately increased the damage Agudo can deal after releasing Furball.
changes.detailZh:
We've increased the damage dealt by Agudo's Basic Attacks after using her Ultimate.
When Agudo uses her Ultimate and releases Furball to attack enemies, her squishy body becomes her weakness.Risks should always be accompanied by rewards, so we have appropriately increased the damage Agudo can deal after releasing Furball.

changes.change: Raised the base damage of his Skill 2.
changes.detail:
Raised the base damage of his Skill 2.
This change to Dharma makes him a more powerful and interesting. We hope that players will find this version of him to be a dependable choice in the Clash Lane or jungler hero pool. By strengthening the base damage of his Skill 2, he will be able to deal a good amount of damage during a fast-moving fight.
changes.detailZh:
提高2技能基礎傷害
重製後的達摩變得比以前更強、更有趣，我們希望他能在目前版本中成為更多對抗路或打野玩家英雄池中的可靠選擇之一。我們強化達摩2技能的基礎傷害，使他在節奏快速的戰鬥中，能更快打出足夠傷害。

changes.change: We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
changes.changeZh: We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
changes.detail:
We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
Dharma's original skill specialties required players to invest a certain amount of practice to make use of their full strength.As more and more heroes have been added, even expert Dharma players sometimes find it hard to compete with him in Hero's Gorge.We've injected Dharma with new power in this latest version, which we hope will make him more effective in combat for new players and veterans alike.
changes.detailZh:
We've retained Dharma's original design and gameplay while upgrading the mechanics of his Passive and some active skills. We've adjusted some of his bonus stats to adapt their strength to the current game environment.
Dharma's original skill specialties required players to invest a certain amount of practice to make use of their full strength.As more and more heroes have been added, even expert Dharma players sometimes find it hard to compete with him in Hero's Gorge.We've injected Dharma with new power in this latest version, which we hope will make him more effective in combat for new players and veterans alike.

changes.change: Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
changes.changeZh: 提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
changes.detail:
Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
We've taken notice of the fact that Butterfly has consistently been rather difficult to play as in the current version of the game. Because she is an assassin hero with high mobility, we would like her to be a worthy opponent against the weaker, but still important, enemies. It's for this reason that we have increased the damage dealt by her Skills 1 and 2. We hope that Butterfly will prove to be a more competent fighter in the current season.
changes.detailZh:
提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
我們發現目前遊戲中，刀鋒寶貝的表現始終不理想。身為一名機動性很強的刺客型英雄，我們希望她能對那些脆弱的關鍵目標造成足夠威脅。因此，我们適度提升了她1技能和2技能所能造成的傷害，希望刀鋒寶貝能在目前賽季有更好的表現。

changes.change: Reduced the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2 based on her level, and reduced her Ultimate's base cooldown.
changes.changeZh: Reduced the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2 based on her level, and reduced her Ultimate's base cooldown.
changes.detail: Butterfly, who just recently joined Honor of Kings, has excellent mobility and her damage output makes her a popular choice at the start of the game. Although we've reduced some of her skill stats, we hope that she will still be an active part of Hero's Gorge. That is why we reduced her skill cooldown: to ensure she is still powerful in the mid to late game.
changes.detailZh: Butterfly, who just recently joined Honor of Kings, has excellent mobility and her damage output makes her a popular choice at the start of the game. Although we've reduced some of her skill stats, we hope that she will still be an active part of Hero's Gorge. That is why we reduced her skill cooldown: to ensure she is still powerful in the mid to late game.

changes.change: We've reworked both passive and active skills, retaining Cirrus' original design and gameplay as much as possible while making his skill set more suitable for the current game environment.
changes.changeZh: We've reworked both passive and active skills, retaining Cirrus' original design and gameplay as much as possible while making his skill set more suitable for the current game environment.
changes.detail:
We've reworked both passive and active skills, retaining Cirrus' original design and gameplay as much as possible while making his skill set more suitable for the current game environment.
As one of the first heroes to be released, the frequency with which Cirrus showed up in matches and his performance caught our attention.We want this hero, with his unique mechanics, to continue to provide more lineup choices and make things fun for Honor of Kings players.To this end, we have redesigned his skill set. The new Cirrus is easier to use than before, and has greater capacity for mastery, allowing more players to spread their wings and fly with this hero in Hero's Gorge.
changes.detailZh:
We've reworked both passive and active skills, retaining Cirrus' original design and gameplay as much as possible while making his skill set more suitable for the current game environment.
As one of the first heroes to be released, the frequency with which Cirrus showed up in matches and his performance caught our attention.We want this hero, with his unique mechanics, to continue to provide more lineup choices and make things fun for Honor of Kings players.To this end, we have redesigned his skill set. The new Cirrus is easier to use than before, and has greater capacity for mastery, allowing more players to spread their wings and fly with this hero in Hero's Gorge.

changes.change: Raised the bonus multiplier for his Basic Attack while his Passive skill is active.
changes.changeZh: 提高被動技能中普通攻擊的加成係數
changes.detail:
Raised the bonus multiplier for his Basic Attack while his Passive skill is active.
Shouyue is a very unique marksman. When using him in combat, players must choose between ranged harassment or damage over time. Currently, the damage dealt by his Basic Attack is not quite high enough. We hope that by increasing the bonus multiplier for his Basic Attack when his Passive skill is active, he will be able to deal more consistent damage while his Skill 2 is in cooldown.
changes.detailZh:
提高被動技能中普通攻擊的加成係數
百里守約是一名戰鬥風格獨特的射手英雄，操控者需在遠程消耗與持續傷害中適當取捨，目前版本百里守約普通攻擊的傷害略顯不足。我們希望強化百里守約被動技能中的普通攻擊加成係數，確保他能在2技能空檔中更穩定地輸出。

changes.change: Added a Basic Attack bonus, linked the Ultimate to Skill 2, and adjusted unique displays.
changes.changeZh: Added a Basic Attack bonus, linked the Ultimate to Skill 2, and adjusted unique displays.
changes.detail: We hope the adjusted Shouyue will have more options to choose from during battle. He can either deal stable damage with his Basic Attacks, or spend bullets to deal high ranged damage or dash out of harm's way. We believe experienced Shouyue players will make the right choice.
changes.detailZh: We hope the adjusted Shouyue will have more options to choose from during battle. He can either deal stable damage with his Basic Attacks, or spend bullets to deal high ranged damage or dash out of harm's way. We believe experienced Shouyue players will make the right choice.

changes.change: Reduced the damage dealt by her Skill 2 when she is using a heavy sword, and reduced the damage dealt by her Ultimate when she is using either weapon.
changes.changeZh: 削弱重劍形態下的2技能，削弱2種形態下大招的傷害
changes.detail:
Reduced the damage dealt by her Skill 2 when she is using a heavy sword, and reduced the damage dealt by her Ultimate when she is using either weapon.
Although the Resistance gained from the Boots of Resistance was previously lowered by only 5%, this change allowed many players to have Mulan unleash complete skill combos against enemies. Since very few heroes are capable of withstanding such an assault, we have lowered the damage dealt from her Skill 2 when using a heavy sword and her Ultimate, in order to balance out the buff granted by the Boots of Resistance.
changes.detailZh:
削弱重劍形態下的2技能，削弱2種形態下大招的傷害
雖然之前抵抗之靴的韌性僅調低了5%，但這樣的調整卻足以讓花木蘭完整地對敵人打出連招，由於很少有英雄能徹底扛住那段連招的傷害，我們希望適度降低花木蘭重劍形態下2技能的揮砍及大招傷害，藉此平衡因抵抗之靴調整而受益的花木蘭。

changes.change: Enhanced the damage bonus ratio for Skills 1 and 2, and adjusted the damage and stat bonus ratios for his Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: Enhanced the damage bonus ratio for Skills 1 and 2, and adjusted the damage and stat bonus ratios for his Ultimate.
changes.detail: As one of the first heroes in Honor of Kings, Kaizer may seem a little weak in comparison to the heroes that have joined since. We hope improving Kaizer's skill damage and stat bonuses will allow him, with the right equipment, to become a true fighter who balances damage output and sustain.
changes.detailZh: As one of the first heroes in Honor of Kings, Kaizer may seem a little weak in comparison to the heroes that have joined since. We hope improving Kaizer's skill damage and stat bonuses will allow him, with the right equipment, to become a true fighter who balances damage output and sustain.

changes.change: Enhanced Gao's mobility through new skills, making it easier for him to get close to the enemy and deal damage to them, with appropriate adjustments to his base stats and damage.
changes.changeZh: Enhanced Gao's mobility through new skills, making it easier for him to get close to the enemy and deal damage to them, with appropriate adjustments to his base stats and damage.
changes.detail: Compared to the typical mage, Gao's close-range combat style is relatively high-risk, but it comes with extremely high rewards. In this update, we have added more ways for Gao to quickly get up close and personal with the enemy so players have more room to play and experiment.
changes.detailZh: Compared to the typical mage, Gao's close-range combat style is relatively high-risk, but it comes with extremely high rewards. In this update, we have added more ways for Gao to quickly get up close and personal with the enemy so players have more room to play and experiment.

changes.change: We've increased the base Health recovery provided by Yang Jian's Ultimate, and changed its equipment bonus type.
changes.changeZh: We've increased the base Health recovery provided by Yang Jian's Ultimate, and changed its equipment bonus type.
changes.detail:
We've increased the base Health recovery provided by Yang Jian's Ultimate, and changed its equipment bonus type.
Yang Jian is the perfect definition of what it means to be comprehensive. By adjusting his Ultimate's recovery effect and bonus, we have tried to make Yang Jian more consistent with his position as a fighter on the battlefield.

changes.change: Increased Dian Wei's Skill 1 damage gain for each skill level.
changes.changeZh: 提高典韋1技能隨技能等級增長所帶來的傷害提升
changes.detail:
Increased Dian Wei's Skill 1 damage gain for each skill level.
Dian Wei's current skill specialty grants him awesome sustained combat ability. In scenarios that require burst damage output, Dian Wei is reliant on multiple pieces of attack equipment to enhance his burst ability. This forces him to sacrifice investing in survivability gear. We've increased the damage of Dian Wei's Skill 1to improve his performance in melee.
changes.detailZh:
提高典韋1技能隨技能等級增長所帶來的傷害提升。
典韋現在的技能特性使他擁有很強的持續作戰能力。在某些需要爆發輸出的場景中，典韋依賴多件攻擊型裝備來強化爆發能力，這使得他承受傷害的能力有限。我們希望適度強化典韋1技能的傷害，藉此提升典韋這位近戰英雄的遊戲體驗感。

changes.change: Now Wuyan can use Skill 1 during her Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: 現在鐘無艷在施放大招過程中可以使用1技能
changes.detail:
Now Wuyan can use Skill 1 during her Ultimate.
Currently Wuyan can fill a diversified role, but whether jungling, lane clashing, or roaming, she struggles to respond to highly mobile heroes with her Ultimate. Now, we've allowed Wuyan to use Skill 1 during her Ultimate. This should allow her to perform well in a wider range of scenarios.
changes.detailZh:
現在鐘無艷在施放大招過程中可以使用1技能。
鐘無艷在目前遊戲版本中可以扮演的角色比較多元，但無論她作為打野、對抗路或是遊走，在她施放大招的過程中，很難對那些機動性較強的英雄產生相應的威脅。現在我們讓鐘無艷可以在施放大招的過程中使用1技能，希望她可以在更多的對戰場景中獲得良好的表現。

changes.change: We've moderately reduced Fang's strength in the early game, while enhancing his power once he reaches higher levels and has sufficient equipment support.
changes.changeZh: We've moderately reduced Fang's strength in the early game, while enhancing his power once he reaches higher levels and has sufficient equipment support.
changes.detail:
We've moderately reduced Fang's strength in the early game, while enhancing his power once he reaches higher levels and has sufficient equipment support.
The current game environment emphasizes laning strength in the early game. Fang's skill mechanics and stats mean that he overly suppresses other heroes in the same position during the early game.We have thus made appropriate adjustments to his strength in the early and late game, to ensure that players can make more diverse hero choices in the current version.

changes.change: Reduced some skill effects, and increased some skill multipliers.
changes.changeZh: Reduced some skill effects, and increased some skill multipliers.
changes.detail: Sun Bin becomes very powerful after reaching a certain level and getting the right equipment, to the point where many unique lineups can be created around him. Since he's currently also pretty powerful during the early game, we lowered some of his basic skill stats and increased some of his skill multipliers so that he can become more of a true late-game hero.

changes.change: Raised the power of his Passive skill and Skill 2 during early game, and reduced his bonus multiplier during late game.
changes.changeZh: 提高被動技能和2技能前期的強度，並適當降低其後期加成係數
changes.detail:
Raised the power of his Passive skill and Skill 2 during early game, and reduced his bonus multiplier during late game.
Wukong is a highly mobile hero, but he requires certain equipment to make up for his Power. As such, it is difficult to use him in combat during early game. Consequently, there are few chances for players to adapt to Wukong's fighting style in the current version of the game. We hope that the adjustments we've implemented will help improve the character's combat capabilities during early game, while also not making him too overpowered during late game.
changes.detailZh:
提高被動技能和2技能前期的強度，並適當降低其後期加成係數
孫悟空是一名機動性很強的英雄，但他需要一定的裝備才能補足戰鬥力，這讓他遊戲前期很難在戰鬥中有所發揮。這種情況使孫悟空難以適應目前版本的戰鬥節奏，我們希望透過調整數值來提升孫悟空的前期作戰能力，並確保其後期不會過於強大。

changes.change: Strengthened the Basic Attack damage enhancement gained from Han Xin's Skill 2.
changes.changeZh: Strengthened the Basic Attack damage enhancement gained from Han Xin's Skill 2.
changes.detail: The Basic Attack enhancement granted by Han Xin's Skill 2 lets him quickly kill monsters and minion, and improves his max burst damage. We hope that this adjustment will allow Han Xin to perform better on the field.
changes.detailZh: The Basic Attack enhancement granted by Han Xin's Skill 2 lets him quickly kill monsters and minion, and improves his max burst damage. We hope that this adjustment will allow Han Xin to perform better on the field.

changes.change: Increased the Movement Speed bonus from his passive when at higher hero levels. Increased the base skill effects of his Ultimate and Skills 1 and 2. Increased the skill buff of Skill 4 at higher hero levels.
changes.changeZh: Increased the Movement Speed bonus from his passive when at higher hero levels. Increased the base skill effects of his Ultimate and Skills 1 and 2. Increased the skill buff of Skill 4 at higher hero levels.
changes.detail: Prince of Lanling is currently not very strong during early game, and unlike with other assassins, even skilled players struggle to make up for the disadvantage in stats through different play styles. We adjusted his base skill stats and multipliers so that more Prince of Lanling players can come forward to help their teams win.

changes.detail:
We've slightly reduced the Health recovery from Basic Attacks enhanced by Skill 2.
Previous adjustments to Lam's skill stat bonuses made his gameplay more diverse, which was in line with our design expectations.We hope that the slight stat reductions this time round will give more opportunities to other heroes.

changes.change: Increased recovery from his passive when dealing damage to heroes.
changes.changeZh: Increased recovery from his passive when dealing damage to heroes.
changes.detail: Although we nerfed the imperil equipment passive in the last season, equipment with that effect has also become suitable for more heroes. By moderately increasing Ata's recovery, we hope to offset the impact of more heroes using this equipment.
changes.detailZh: Although we nerfed the imperil equipment passive in the last season, equipment with that effect has also become suitable for more heroes. By moderately increasing Ata's recovery, we hope to offset the impact of more heroes using this equipment.

changes.change: Increased physical damage when using Skill 2. Increased physical damage when using the Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: Increased physical damage when using Skill 2. Increased physical damage when using the Ultimate.
changes.detail: As a jungler with a rather unique design, Agudo and her partner Furball perform well when supporting other heroes and tanking damage. But we realized that Furball's damage is lacking. Since Furball has to fight and carry Agudo around the map, we've fed it some extra snacks to bulk up and improve the duo's strength.

changes.change: Increased the Ultimate's base cooldown, but kept its cooldown the same as before at max level.
changes.changeZh: Increased the Ultimate's base cooldown, but kept its cooldown the same as before at max level.
changes.detail: Alessio's mechanics made him one of the most powerful marksmen in the late-game. However, he's currently also able to use his ult to frequently deal burst damage and even achieve the Extreme Escape feat in the early game. We hope these light adjustments will make players use a wider variety of skills to gain an early-game advantage, while at the same time not affecting Alessio's late-game prowess.

changes.change: Reduced the damage of Skill 1 when using dual swords or heavy sword.
changes.changeZh: Reduced the damage of Skill 1 when using dual swords or heavy sword.
changes.detail: Mulan's skill mechanics grant her mobility, crowd control immunity, burst damage, and crowd control. Different skill combinations let her face different opponents and adapt to evolving situations on the battlefield. Heroes like Mulan have enormous potential, and skilled players can do incredible things with them. We want Mulan players to have more of a challenge before taking over matches, rather than easily suppressing rivals with relatively simple and fixed tactics early on.

changes.change: Reduced the base damage of Skills 1 and 2, but kept the same basic damage as before at max level.
changes.changeZh: Reduced the base damage of Skills 1 and 2, but kept the same basic damage as before at max level.
changes.detail: Di Renjie deals high burst damage in melee range with Skills 1 and 2, and is able to poke enemies from afar with his Basic Attacks. These two characterisics made him very powerful at laning during early game, even before he's all geared up. Considering that he's a solid hero during mid to late game, we want Di Renjie to be less punishing during early game.

changes.change: Reduced his Skill 2 base cooldown time, increased its recovery effect, and added a new effect: it will now also restore Health to him upon hitting non-hero units.
changes.changeZh: Reduced his Skill 2 base cooldown time, increased its recovery effect, and added a new effect: it will now also restore Health to him upon hitting non-hero units.
changes.detail: Guitarist is one of just a few mages in the game who are able to engage in melee combat. To these heroes, the ability to stay alive and in the fight is key. We hope to give our players more choices when it comes to mage heroes, and that by enhancing his Skill 2 recovery, he'll be able to take part in team fights more often without having to worry too much about taking some damage.
