changes.change: Reduced initial cooldown of Skill 1 and the Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: Reduced initial cooldown of Skill 1 and the Ultimate.
changes.detail: Gan & Mo's gameplay is full of surprises and challenges. When things are clicking, the duo can instantly obliterate enemies. However, their cooldowns are a little long for to the pace of combat in Hero's Gorge. By lowering the cooldown for their Skill 1 and Ultimate, we've enhanced the duo's survivability and provided more opportunities to obliterate rivals.

changes.change: Reduced the basic Movement Speed bonus from his Skill 2, while increasing the additional bonus received per skill level.
changes.changeZh: Reduced the basic Movement Speed bonus from his Skill 2, while increasing the additional bonus received per skill level.
changes.detail: Sun Bin is a hero with a very high performance ceiling, and many strategies and lineups in the game are centered on him. Although Sun Bin is a late-game hero, he does have considerable capabilities in the early game. For instance, he can easily use his Skill 2 speed-up to run up to you, throw a Time Bomb at you and then speed away before you can hit back. This is why we decided to reduce Skill 2's base Movement Speed bonus while increasing its rate of increase per level. The Movement Speed bonus when Skill 2 is fully leveled remains the same. We hope that with these adjustments Sun Bin will be more in line with his positioning as a late-game hero, with measured capabilities in the early game.

changes.change: Reduced the Health recovery effects of Bian Que's Skill 2. Reduced the basic Health recovery effect of his Ultimate but increased the rate of increase for effects per skill level.
changes.changeZh: Reduced the Health recovery effects of Bian Que's Skill 2. Reduced the basic Health recovery effect of his Ultimate but increased the rate of increase for effects per skill level.
changes.detail: At the beginning of the new season, we reduced the effect of the Imperil equipment passive. The goal was to make life a little easier for heroes with healing capabilities. However, this also meant that when Dr Bian was well equipped or matched with other healers, his team would have an outsized advantage. As we hope to see players continue to use healers and the corresponding lineups, we have made certain adjustments to Dr Bian's skill stats to moderate his capabilities in the early-to-mid game. At the same time, Dr Bian will become more powerful than before when he reaches the higher levels.

changes.change: Reduced the level-up increment of his base Attack stat and his Skill 1 physical damage.
changes.changeZh: Reduced the level-up increment of his base Attack stat and his Skill 1 physical damage.
changes.detail: Thanks to his skill's true damage mechanic, Marco Polo can equip multiple pieces of defensive equipment while still being able to deal lots of damage when poking and deliver tremendous burst damage during team fights. By mid to late game, Marco Polo is able to do just about everything the other marksmen can. By making some slight adjustments to his laning capabilities and late game strength, we hope to make this highly versatily marksman just a little bit less powerful.

changes.change: Increased his Skill 2's physical damage and Mana cost, and adjusted his Ultimate's damage.
changes.changeZh: Increased his Skill 2's physical damage and Mana cost, and adjusted his Ultimate's damage.
changes.detail: Han Xin's strength lies in his extremely high mobility and ability to deliver burst damage once fully equipped. On the other hand, as an assassin jungler, he needs more time to farm, and can often be put on his back foot in tough situations. We hope that by enhancing his Skill 2 and adjusting his Ultimate, he will now be able to clear monsters at a slightly higher speed and become stronger than before with the same equipment. This will allow Han Xin to take part in early game skirmishes sooner.

changes.change: Increased magical damage dealt by Skill 1.
changes.changeZh: Increased magical damage dealt by Skill 1.
changes.detail: With her high level of difficulty and enormous potential, Luna can deal massive damage as long as she constantly refreshes her Ultimate. But when Lunais interrupted or the player makes a mistake, there's not much left for her to do other than spam Skill 1. Considering the occasional mistakes, we want Skill 1 to pose more of a threat. In this way, we can further increase Luna's overall strength and let her shine even brighter in the Gorge.

changes.change: Reduced the base cooldown of his Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: Reduced the base cooldown of his Ultimate.
changes.detail: A number of new fighter heroes have made their debut in Hero's Gorge in the last few updates. As a result, Guan Yu now appears a little weak when compared to newer fighter heroes with their arsenals of flashy skills. We hope that enhancing Guan Yu's Ultimate will make him a more attractive option for our players.

changes.change: Increased Skill 1's base damage, reduced Skill 2's cooldown; adjusted the base damage, recovery, and equipment bonus multiplier for Skill 2 and the enhanced Basic Attacks; adjusted the base damage and equipment bonus multiplier for the Ultimate.
changes.changeZh: Increased Skill 1's base damage, reduced Skill 2's cooldown; adjusted the base damage, recovery, and equipment bonus multiplier for Skill 2 and the enhanced Basic Attacks; adjusted the base damage and equipment bonus multiplier for the Ultimate.
changes.detail: Lam is a little weak during early game in this version, which makes him less fun to play when your team is at a disadvantage. We boosted the base damage and recovery effects of his skills and hope this will enhance his early-to-mid game performance. We also adjusted the equipment bonus multiplier of some skills so he's not too powerful during late game.

We also adjusted the equipment bonus multiplier of some skills so he's not too powerful during late game.

changes.detail: Arli is a marksman with great mobility, and was one of the best laners among the marksman heroes. This has allowed players who used Arli to quickly build up a resource lead and begin to inflict fatal damage on their rivals by mid game. We hope that with this change, victories achieved with Arli will feel more like the result of the player's skill, rather than the hero's strength.
